description_long: This object is a classic umbrella with a wide, circular canopy that appears to be made from a single, solid-colored material. The canopy is slightly domed and features subtle, evenly spaced segment divisions along its edge, giving it a scalloped appearance. The central shaft is straight and slender, extending downward from the center of the canopy. The handle is not visibly curved or ergonomic, instead appearing as a simple, straight extension of the shaft. The entire umbrella is a uniform dark color, with no visible patterns or decorative elements. The tip of the umbrella is blunt and unadorned, matching the minimalist design.
description: A dark, circular umbrella with a scalloped canopy and a straight, simple shaft. The design is minimalist and solid-colored.
description_view_0: The umbrella is viewed from a slightly angled top-down perspective, showing the full circular canopy and the straight shaft extending downward.
description_view_1: This view is similar to view 0 but rotated, still highlighting the round canopy and the straight shaft, with the scalloped edge visible.
description_view_2: The umbrella is seen from another rotated angle, maintaining the visibility of the canopy's scalloped edge and the straight shaft.
description_view_3: This view shows the umbrella from yet another side, with the same features: a circular, scalloped canopy and a straight shaft.
